message:
chore: add ephemeral profiling/scanner artifacts to .gitignore

Add patterns for files that repeatedly appear as untracked noise
from profiling and scanning sessions:

- artifacts/ — callgrind/cachegrind profiling output directory
- ubs_output.txt — Ultimate Bug Scanner output
- output.txt — generic scratch output from agent sessions
- *.diff — scratch diff files from code review

These files are transient and should never be committed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -108,3 +108,13 @@ repro_*.rs
 
 # Claude local settings
 .claude/settings.local.json
+
+# Profiling artifacts directory (callgrind, cachegrind, etc.)
+artifacts/
+
+# UBS (Ultimate Bug Scanner) output
+ubs_output.txt
+
+# Generic scratch output
+output.txt
+*.diff
